blocks.body: Amazon S3 (and S3-compatible services like Cloudflare R2, MinIO, DigitalOcean Spaces) is the standard for file storage in production. Files are stored as objects with unique keys, and you get unlimited scalable storage with built-in redundancy.
Raw user uploads are often 5-10MB photos straight from a camera. An image optimization pipeline resizes, compresses, and converts images to modern formats (WebP, AVIF) before serving them.
